title: Milestone groups phases via a placement relation
description: A phase is placed in a milestone by a relation mirroring task_positioned_in_phase. A milestone is reached when its placed phases are done.

evidence.reference: relation_types has task_positioned_in_phase (tasks->phase) but no phase->milestone placement; milestone block absent (FGAP-037)

impact: Milestone rollup has no edge to read; phases cannot be grouped under a milestone.
proposed_resolution: Register a phase-in-milestone placement relation_type; milestone done-ness reads up it.
